# M2: Skydive

> Plummeting to the earth with my best friend Jessie.
> She was the happiest she had ever looked.
> It took a while for me to realise I must have looked the same as I was deafened by the wind and our ecstatic screams.

- Scene
    - Jessie encourages a nervous Emily to jump out the parachute, reminding her its for a animal charity
    - Jessie and Emily jump out the plane and skydive, screaming their heads off
    - Emily pulls her cord first and watches Jessie continue to dive till she reluctantly pulls her cord in time
- Altered scene
    - After Emily pulls her cord Jessie is struck by a goose and knocked unconscious
    - She plummets to the ground
    - Emily finds her lifeless body, neck bent like the dead goose beside her
